<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Returns code at a given contract address"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/eth_getCode"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



**`eth_getCode`** - Returns code at a given contract address

Send a **JSON-RPC 2.0** request (`jsonrpc`, `method`, `params`, `id`) as in the example below.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["jsonrpc","method","params","id"],"properties":{"jsonrpc":{"type":"string","enum":["2.0"]},"method":{"type":"string","enum":["eth_getCode"]},"params":{"type":"array","description":"Ordered JSON array of positional parameters for this method.","minItems":2,"maxItems":2,"items":{"oneOf":[{"title":"address","type":"string","description":"EOA or Contract address","pattern":"^0x[a-fA-F\\d]{40}$"},{"title":"blockRefOrNumberOrTag","oneOf":[{"title":"blockRef","type":"object","description":"Object defining block references","properties":{"blockHash":{"title":"blockHash","type":"string","pattern":"^0x[a-fA-F\\d]{64}$","description":"The hex representation of the Keccak 256 of the RLP encoded block"},"blockNumber":{"title":"blockNumberHex","type":"string","description":"The hex representation of the block's height","pattern":"^0x[a-fA-F0-9]+$"}}},{"title":"blockNumberHex","type":"string","description":"The hex representation of the block's height","pattern":"^0x[a-fA-F0-9]+$"},{"title":"blockNumberTag","type":"string","description":"A fixed tag describing block height, check options below.","enum":["earliest","latest","pending"]}]}]}},"id":{"oneOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"string"}],"example":1}}},"example":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"eth_getCode","params":["0xa94f5374fce5edbc8e2a8697c15331677e6ebf0b","0x2"],"id":1}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Successful JSON-RPC 2.0 response over HTTP. The return value is in `result`. On failure, nodes typically still respond with HTTP 200 and an `error` object instead of `result`.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["jsonrpc","id","result"],"properties":{"jsonrpc":{"type":"string","enum":["2.0"]},"id":{"oneOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"string"}]},"result":{"title":"bytes","type":"string","description":"Hex representation of a variable length byte array","pattern":"^0x([a-fA-F0-9]?)+$"}}},"example":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"result":"0x600160008035811a818181146012578301005b601b6001356025565b8060005260206000f25b600060078202905091905056"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
